nasb.text: select the best and fittest of your master’s sons, and set him on his father’s throne, and fight for your master’s house.”

esv.text: select the best and fittest of your master’s sons and set him on his father’s throne and fight for your master’s house.”

cnv.text: 你們就要看看在你們主人的兒子中，哪一個是最好最合適的，把他立在父親的寶座上；你們又要為你們主人的家作戰。”

ccb.text: 就可以从你们主人的子孙中选立一个最好的继承王位，为你们主人家而战。”
